nasb.text: When the crowds saw what Paul had done, they raised their voice, saying in the Lycaonian language, “The gods have become like men and have come down to us.”

esv.text: And when the crowds saw what Paul had done, they lifted up their voices, saying in Lycaonian, “The gods have come down to us in the likeness of men!”

cnv.text: 眾人看見保羅所作的事，就用呂高尼話大聲說：“有神明成了人形，降到我們這裡來了！”

ccb.text: 周围的人看见保罗所行的，就用吕高尼话大声说：“神明化成人形下凡了！”

csbs.text: 众人看见保罗所做的，就用利考尼亚话高声说：“神明像人那样降临在我们中间了！”
